name: Kolace Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and shortening for a pie crust.
2. Make a hole in the center of the mixture and add egg yolks, milk, yeast, and vanilla.
3. Mix until smooth and dough leaves the sides of the bowl.
4. Form into large balls; each should be just large enough to roll out at one time.
5. Cover with wax paper and refrigerate overnight.
6. Roll out each ball about 1/4 inch thick on a board covered with powdered sugar.
7. Cut dough into 2-inch or 3-inch squares.
8. Place 1 teaspoon of desired filling in the center of each square of dough; fold dough over to the opposite side and pinch together or roll into horn shape.
9. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Bake in a 350°F oven until lightly brown, about 12 to 15 minutes.
11. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
